positive: A charming, cartoon-style illustration of a group of happy woodland animals (raccoons, squirrels, and hedgehogs) having a picnic under a large oak tree. The style is bright, cheerful, and suitable for children's merchandise, storybook quality, vector art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, hyper-realistic, scary, dark colors, oil painting, messy outlines
